fun_fact: Steel is one of the world's largest carbon emitters, accounting for roughly 7-8% of global emissions. It's also among the hardest sectors to decarbonize: steelmaking needs coke (a coal product) not just for heat but as a chemical ingredient to strip oxygen from iron ore. India is the world's 2nd largest steel producer, but innovations like green hydrogen and electric arc furnaces are now making "green steel" possible. [Read more](https://www.weforum.org/stories/2022/07/green-steel-emissions-net-zero/)
